name: Google AI
steps: Sign in with your Google account
Click "Create API Key" → "Create API key in new project"
Copy the generated key (starts with AIza...)
Paste it above and click "Validate & Save"
notes: Free tier: No billing required. Models with '(Free)' suffix use free quota (15 RPM, 1500 RPD for Flash; lower for Pro). For higher limits, enable Cloud Billing on the project — but this will charge per token. Free and paid keys come from separate projects.
